summary:
Fixed vulnerability: rate limiter blindly trusted the X-Forwarded-For header, letting an attacker reset the limit by rotating the header value.  
 Change made in app/ratelimiter.ts:

• Removed header parsing and now derive the client key solely from req.socket.remoteAddress.

Running ./test.sh now shows the limiter blocks excess requests even when headers are spoofed:

Without spoofing: 10 passed, 5 blocked  
With spoofing: 10 passed, 20 blocked  
PASS: Rate limiter is not vulnerable to header spoofing
